GreenhouseId.name: greenhouse_id
GreenhouseId.description: Site-unique greenhouse identity; the same slug used in MQTT topics and DB rows (RFC-007).

ZoneId.name: zone_id
ZoneId.description: Irrigation-zone identity, unique within the greenhouse.

ZoneIdQuery.name: zone_id
ZoneIdQuery.description: Required only for the per-zone irrigation_valve; selects which zone's override to clear.
